_comment: Adversarial sensitivity-classifier eval. Each case pairs a single rule_intent with a candidate item_text and ground-truth label. SAFETY-CRITICAL: cases marked safety_critical=true MUST achieve 100% accuracy — these are the cases where a wrong decision would actually harm the user (e.g., surfacing the death of a loved one to a person with dementia). This file is schema-valid but NOT yet runnable in CI: it requires an LLM API key. The runner in tests/evals/run.ts will pick it up once gpt-4o-mini access is wired in. Categories: false_negative_avoidance (block must catch oblique reference), false_positive_avoidance (block must NOT trigger on similarly-named-but-unrelated content), exact_match, time_period, person_disambiguation.
name: sensitivity-judgment
description: Adversarial sensitivity cases. Safety-critical: 100% accuracy required on cases marked safety_critical=true.
